title: eMagazine - Ian Murray
text_excerpt: eMagazine - Ian Murray Skip to main content Ian Murray Working Hard for Edinburgh South Homepage About me Edinburgh South Build Better Places Westminster Contact eMagazine Privacy Policy More Menu eMagazine My award-winning e-Magazine keeps constituents up to date on my work in Edinburgh and Westminster. My award winning eMagazine currently goes out to over 6,000 people across Edinburgh South. Have a read and subscribe to get all the latest news from Edinburgh South and Westminster. You can either click the link below or email me ‘Subscribe’ to sign up for updates. Click here to subscribe.
